files.message_content:
We built 4,444 downloadable AI agent workspaces for our NFT collection where each NFT's visual traits deterministically map to a unique personality through 7 dimensions (Big Five + trading scores).

Every workspace ships with ElizaOS V1 spec compatibility — YAML frontmatter + character.json export. Also built a 3-tier MemGPT-style memory system and a live market data pipeline that injects real-time CoinGecko/DeFiLlama/DexScreener data into agent sessions.

Soul viewer + download: https://the-undesirables.com/soul

Would love any feedback from people building in this space.
